hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"master/main 브랜치에 직접 커밋은 금지됩니다. feature/hotfix/release 브랜치를 사용하세요."}'; exit 0; fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qP '(feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|perf|test|chore|ci)(\(.+\))?: '; then echo '{"decision":"allow"}'; else echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"커밋 메시지가 Conventional Commits 형식이 아닙니다.\n형식: <type>(<scope>): <subject>\ntype: feat | fix | docs | style | refactor | perf | test | chore | ci"}'; fi
